---
title: "License"
author:
  - Nascimento, M.^[Moyses Nascimento, Associate Professor, Department of Statistics - Federal University of Viçosa, moysesnascim@ufv.br]
  - Costa, W. G.^[Weverton Gomes da Costa, Postdoctoral Researcher, Department of Statistics - Federal University of Viçosa, weverton.costa@ufv.br]
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
url: https://wevertongomescosta.github.io/nonlinear-ge-interaction-shap/
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: FALSE
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
github-repo: wevertongomescosta/nonlinear-ge-interaction-shap
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)
```

# License

Except where otherwise indicated, the materials in this repository are distributed under the **Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International License — CC BY-NC-SA 4.0**.

## Permissions

Under this license, the material may be:

- **shared** — copied and redistributed in any medium or format;
- **adapted** — remixed, transformed, and used as the basis for derivative material.

## Conditions

Reuse is permitted under the following conditions:

- **Attribution** — appropriate credit must be provided, a link to the license must be included, and modifications must be identified;
- **NonCommercial** — the material may not be used for commercial purposes;
- **ShareAlike** — adapted material must be distributed under the same license;
- **No additional restrictions** — legal or technological restrictions may not prevent others from exercising the rights granted by the license.

The attribution must not imply endorsement by the original authors.

## Full license text

The official legal text is available at:

[https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/legalcode](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/legalcode)

## Suggested citation

Nascimento, M. and Costa, W. G. (2026). *Non-Linear Modeling of Genotype × Environment Interaction via Tree-Based Learning Algorithms and Shapley Decomposition*. Workflowr project website and analytical repository. Available at: https://wevertongomescosta.github.io/nonlinear-ge-interaction-shap/

When scientific methods, results, or interpretations from the associated manuscript are reused, the manuscript should also be cited using its final bibliographic information.

## Third-party materials

Files or materials containing separate attribution, citation, or licensing statements remain subject to their original terms.

## Disclaimer

The analytical materials are provided for research, teaching, and reproducibility purposes. Users are responsible for verifying their suitability for a particular application.

## Contact

**Moyses Nascimento**  
Associate Professor — Department of Statistics — Federal University of Viçosa  
[moysesnascim@ufv.br](mailto:moysesnascim@ufv.br)

**Weverton Gomes da Costa**  
Postdoctoral Researcher — Department of Statistics — Federal University of Viçosa  
[weverton.costa@ufv.br](mailto:weverton.costa@ufv.br)
